title: Sidekick for Nonprofits
excerpt:
We’ve hit a major roadblock with the recent Sidekick rollout. While I totally understand the need for tiers and limits, the current setup has unfortunately cut off our access to Sidekick.

posts.author: KristaR (Krista)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve hit a major roadblock with the recent Sidekick rollout. While I totally understand the need for tiers and limits, the current setup has unfortunately cut off our access to Sidekick.

For nonprofits, there’s not even the 5 daily uses included with Standard and Pro accounts. What’s even tougher is that there isn’t even an option for us to buy credits or add them on a paid basis for the first 10 users.

We’d love to see the nonprofit tier treated with the same access as Standard or Pro, so we don’t lose this functionality entirely.

posts.author: Eran-Rozen (Eran Rozen )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Krista,
Eran from monday.com here

We’re working to open all AI capabilities, including Sidekick, to the nonprofit plan.
We will update once it’s available.

Thanks for this feedback.
